notes: Same handle across FB and IG with matching display name — easiest case
Same name with different separators — normalization should collapse them
Handle suffix .oficial — JW prefix boost + display match should merge
Same handle but different display names — must NOT merge (defensive)
Same-platform random handles — never merged in v2b by design (cross-platform only)
Different handles + names but 2 shared content_hashes and JW>=0.6 — bridge fires
No name similarity AND no shared content — must NOT merge
Two disjoint personas — clustering must not bleed
Same handle but no display-name corroboration → AMBIGUOUS not MATCH
Lone author — no persona emitted (personas need >=2 members)
Transitive closure: FB-IG match exactly + X via handle similarity + name → 3-member persona
